content.json:
# DR Overview — blog-castilho

Visão geral do ambiente de Disaster Recovery multi-região.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "AzureSiteRecoveryReplicationStats"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Resource
| project Resource, ReplicationHealthStatus_s, RecoveryPointObjectiveInSeconds
content.title: ASR — Saúde da Replicação

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where MetricName == "GeoReplicationLag"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize avg(Average) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| project TimeGenerated, LagSeconds = avg_Average
content.title: Storage — Lag de Geo-Replicação (segundos)

content.query:
KubeNodeInventory
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by Computer
| project Computer, Status, ClusterName
content.title: AKS — Estado dos Nodes

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where Category == "AzureFirewallNetworkRule"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Action_s
| project TimeGenerated, Action_s, count_
content.title: Azure Firewall — Tráfego por Hora
